NKJV.1: A Psalm of David. The LORD is my shepherd; I shall not want.
NKJV.2: He makes me to lie down in green pastures;  He leads me beside the still waters.
NKJV.3: He restores my soul;  He leads me in the paths of righteousness For His name’s sake.
NKJV.4: Yea, though I walk through the valley of the shadow of death, I will fear no evil; For You are with me; Your rod and Your staff, they comfort me.
NKJV.5: You prepare a table before me in the presence of my enemies; You anoint my head with oil; My cup runs over.
NKJV.6: Surely goodness and mercy shall follow me All the days of my life; And I will dwell in the house of the LORD Forever.

KJV.1: A Psalm<S>4210</S> of David<S>1732</S>. The LORD<S>3068</S> is my shepherd<S>7462</S>; I shall not want<S>2637</S>.
KJV.2: He maketh me to lie down<S>7257</S> in green<S>1877</S> pastures<S>4999</S>: he leadeth<S>5095</S> me beside the still<S>4496</S> waters<S>4325</S>. <sup>green: Heb. pastures of tender grass</sup> <sup>still: Heb. waters of quietness</sup>
KJV.3: He restoreth<S>7725</S> my soul<S>5315</S>: he leadeth<S>5148</S> me in the paths<S>4570</S> of righteousness<S>6664</S> for his name's<S>8034</S> sake.
KJV.4: Yea, though I walk<S>3212</S> through the valley<S>1516</S> of the shadow of death<S>6757</S>, I will fear<S>3372</S> no evil<S>7451</S>: for thou art with me; thy rod<S>7626</S> and thy staff<S>4938</S> they comfort<S>5162</S> me.
KJV.5: Thou preparest<S>6186</S> a table<S>7979</S> before<S>6440</S> me in the presence of mine enemies<S>6887</S>: thou anointest<S>1878</S> my head<S>7218</S> with oil<S>8081</S>; my cup<S>3563</S> runneth over<S>7310</S>. <sup>anointest: Heb. makest fat</sup>
KJV.6: Surely goodness<S>2896</S> and mercy<S>2617</S> shall follow<S>7291</S> me all the days<S>3117</S> of my life<S>2416</S>: and I will dwell<S>3427</S> in the house<S>1004</S> of the LORD<S>3068</S> for ever<S>753</S> <S>3117</S>. <sup>for ever: Heb. to length of days</sup>

ESV.1: The LORD is my shepherd; I shall not want.
ESV.2: He makes me lie down in green pastures. He leads me beside still waters.
ESV.3: He restores my soul. He leads me in paths of righteousness  for his name's sake.
ESV.4: Even though I walk through the valley of the shadow of death,  I will fear no evil, for you are with me; your rod and your staff, they comfort me.
ESV.5: You prepare a table before me in the presence of my enemies; you anoint my head with oil; my cup overflows.
ESV.6: Surely  goodness and mercy  shall follow me all the days of my life, and I shall dwell  in the house of the LORD forever.

NASB.1: A Psalm of David. The LORD is my shepherd, I shall not want.
NASB.2: He makes me lie down in green pastures; He leads me beside quiet waters.
NASB.3: He restores my soul; He guides me in the paths of righteousness For His name's sake.
NASB.4: Even though I walk through the valley of the shadow of death, I fear no evil, for You are with me; Your rod and Your staff, they comfort me.
NASB.5: You prepare a table before me in the presence of my enemies; You have anointed my head with oil; My cup overflows.
NASB.6: Surely goodness and lovingkindness will follow me all the days of my life, And I will dwell in the house of the LORD forever.

NLT.1:
The LORD is my shepherd;
I have all that I need.
NLT.2:
He lets me rest in green meadows;
he leads me beside peaceful streams.
NLT.3:
He renews my strength.
He guides me along right paths,
bringing honor to his name.
NLT.4:
Even when I walk
through the darkest valley,
I will not be afraid,
for you are close beside me.
Your rod and your staff
protect and comfort me.
NLT.5:
You prepare a feast for me
in the presence of my enemies.
You honor me by anointing my head with oil.
My cup overflows with blessings.
NLT.6:
Surely your goodness and unfailing love will pursue me
all the days of my life,
and I will live in the house of the LORD
forever.

WEB.1: A Psalm by David. Yahweh is my shepherd: I shall lack nothing.
WEB.2: He makes me lie down in green pastures. He leads me beside still waters.
WEB.3: He restores my soul. He guides me in the paths of righteousness for his name’s sake.
WEB.4: Even though I walk through the valley of the shadow of death, I will fear no evil, for you are with me. Your rod and your staff, they comfort me.
WEB.5: You prepare a table before me in the presence of my enemies. You anoint my head with oil. My cup runs over.
WEB.6: Surely goodness and loving kindness shall follow me all the days of my life, and I will dwell in Yahweh’s house forever.

AMP.1:
A Psalm of David. The LORD is my Shepherd [to feed, to guide and to shield me],
I shall not want.
AMP.2:
He lets me lie down in green pastures;
He leads me beside the still and quiet waters.
AMP.3:
He refreshes and restores my soul (life);
He leads me in the paths of righteousness
for His name's sake.
AMP.4:
Even though I walk through the [sunless] valley of the shadow of death,
I fear no evil, for You are with me;
Your rod [to protect] and Your staff [to guide], they comfort and console me.
AMP.5:
You prepare a table before me in the presence of my enemies.
You have anointed and refreshed my head with oil;
My cup overflows.
AMP.6:
Surely goodness and mercy and unfailing love shall follow me all the days of my life,
And I shall dwell forever [throughout all my days] in the house and in the presence of the LORD.

MSG.1:
A David psalm
God, my shepherd!
I don't need a thing.
MSG.2:
You have bedded me down in lush meadows,
you find me quiet pools to drink from.
MSG.3:
True to your word,
you let me catch my breath
and send me in the right direction.
MSG.4:
Even when the way goes through
Death Valley,
I'm not afraid
when you walk at my side.
Your trusty shepherd's crook
makes me feel secure.
MSG.5:
You serve me a six-course dinner
right in front of my enemies.
You revive my drooping head;
my cup brims with blessing.
MSG.6:
Your beauty and love chase after me
every day of my life.
I'm back home in the house of God
for the rest of my life.

NIV.1:
Psalm 23
A psalm of David.
The Lord is my shepherd, I shall not be in want.
NIV.2:
He makes me lie down in green pastures,
he leads me beside quiet waters,
NIV.3:
he restores my soul.
He guides me in paths of righteousness
for his name’s sake.
NIV.4:
Even though I walk
through the valley of the shadow of death,
I will fear no evil,
for you are with me;
your rod and your staff,
they comfort me.
NIV.5:
You prepare a table before me
in the presence of my enemies.
You anoint my head with oil;
my cup overflows.
NIV.6:
Surely goodness and love will follow me
all the days of my life,
and I will dwell in the house of the Lord
forever.

NRSVCE.1: The LORD is my shepherd, I shall not want.
NRSVCE.2:
He makes me lie down in green pastures;
he leads me beside still waters;
NRSVCE.3:
he restores my soul.
He leads me in right paths
for his name’s sake.
NRSVCE.4:
Even though I walk through the darkest valley,
I fear no evil;
for you are with me;
your rod and your staff —
they comfort me.
NRSVCE.5:
You prepare a table before me
in the presence of my enemies;
you anoint my head with oil;
my cup overflows.
NRSVCE.6:
Surely goodness and mercy shall follow me
all the days of my life,
and I shall dwell in the house of the LORD
my whole life long.

NET.1: The LORD is my shepherd, I lack nothing.
NET.2: He takes me to lush pastures, he leads me to refreshing water.
NET.3: He restores my strength. He leads me down the right paths for the sake of his reputation.
NET.4: Even when I must walk through the darkest valley, I fear no danger, for you are with me; your rod and your staff reassure me.
NET.5: You prepare a feast before me in plain sight of my enemies. You refresh my head with oil; my cup is completely full.
NET.6: Surely your goodness and faithfulness will pursue me all my days, and I will live in the LORD’s house for the rest of my life.
